message:
perf(types): homogeneous-batch encode_batch fast path (IMPL-21 / AAC-P7)

When all rows in the batch have identical serial types (common for
bulk INSERT into a uniformly-typed table), compute the header once
and reuse it across rows. Auto-probed via encode_batch_auto; existing
encode_batch callers untouched.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
